title: チケゾー☆ナイトフィーバー！

text_block_list.text:
While visiting Bubblyland, I see Winning Ticket
tending to someone.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay?! You must have twisted your ankle!
Hold onto my shoulders!
Yowch! Geez Louise, that smarts!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You poor thing! I'll go call the park staff!

No way! I'm about to go on stage! They won't let
me dance if they find out I'm hurt!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wait, are you... You're the star of Bubblyland,
Fuzzy Buddy, right?!

text_block_list.name: Fuzzy Buddy
text_block_list.text: Yes. It is I, Fuzzy Buddy, star to kiddos everywhere. Even if I have to sacrifice my feet and my Friday night, I will stand on that stage and bring a smile to their faces!
choice_data_list: You're seriously planning to dance in this state?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...Uwaaaagh! That's such a cool way to liiive!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It takes a lot of guts to sacrifice your legs!
Entertainment must really mean the world to
you... You're such a bright, sparkly staaarrr!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I gotta help you! How about I stand in for you?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Let me help too! You always put on such great
shows for us, Fuzzy Buddy. Now we can do
something for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuzzy Buddy
text_block_list.text:
But you're totally unprepared! I can't let you two
go up on that stage like this!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Please! We'll make sure the show's spectacular!
We won't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Fuzzy Buddy
text_block_list.text:
Th-those eyes! They're burning with true bubbly
fire! ...All right. I believe in you two!

text_block_list.name: Fuzzy Buddy
text_block_list.text: Tonight's show is up to you guys!

Having taken Fuzzy Buddy to the infirmary, we
head back to the stage where we can already hear
lively music. It sounds like the show is starting!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
YAAAY! Hey, everyone! Tonight we've got
something extra special for all of you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! Let that fever rock your whole body!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where's Fuzzy Buddy?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Nighttime Bubblyland starts now! Let's get things
bubbly!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text:
BOOO! You call that dancing?! Get Fuzzy Buddy
out here already!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh my... What a tough crowd. This is rough!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Regroup, Maruzen! As you'd say, it's time to
boogie-woogie!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wahooo! Are y'all feeling it?! My engine's going full throttle!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text:
Are they seriously going to dance all night?
They're gonna regret that in the morning!

The two desperate dancers go nonstop for over
an hour, and the audience starts to see them in a
new light!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! This is so fun! Come on, everyone! Get
louder! Give in to the FEVER!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text:
Who cares about time? We're back in the bubble
era now!
Back in time, back in style!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's working, Tickezo! They're all in sync!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We're just getting warmed up! Let's go, everyone!
Get it MOVING!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: BOOOYAAAAH!
Splaaash!

Winning Ticket performs a flip in midair, before
diving into the pool with acrobatic flair!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text:
WOOHOOO!
Rock our socks off!

The spectators start diving in one after another! It
looks like Winning Ticket's enthusiasm has caught
hold of them!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! They're totally into it! Looks like they all
wanna make the most of their time here!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Check you out, thinking of the fans! You're
practically a star yourself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If they wish hard enough for it, anyone can be
whoever they wanna be! I'm so happy I got to
show that to them!

With their improvised show, Winning Ticket and
Maruzensky bring more fun to Bubblyland than
it's ever known!
